name: quick-web-search
title: Quick Search
description: Query Perplexity, Google, Google AI Mode, DuckDuckGo, Bing, or YouTube instantly with live suggestions. Assign a hotkey (like ⌘P) for quick access.
author: ramiruwanigathunga

commands.name: search
commands.title: Quick Search
commands.description:
Search Perplexity, Google, Google AI Mode, DuckDuckGo, Bing, or YouTube instantly.

Tip: assign a hotkey to this command — press it, type, hit Enter.

preferences.name: defaultEngine
preferences.title: Default Search Engine
preferences.description: Initial engine. The dropdown remembers your last selection.

preferences.name: rememberHistory
preferences.title: Search History
preferences.label: Remember recent searches
preferences.description: Show recent searches when the search bar is empty.
